title: Hamosa hypoleuca
intro: There is no information available on a plant called "Hamosa hypoleuca."
taxonomy: Hamosa hypoleuca is a species of fish within the family Clupeidae. It is commonly known as the round herring or Pacific round herring. This species belongs to the genus Hamosa. The classification of Hamosa hypoleuca places it in the kingdom Animalia, phylum Chordata, class Actinopterygii, and order Clupeiformes. Further classification includes the family Clupeidae within the order Clupeiformes.
